flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Dakota County Technical College fell 26% between 2006 and 2009 (46.4% → 34.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Dakota County Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Dakota County Technical College are 14% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($51.9k vs $45.6k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Dakota County Technical College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (65.3% → 73.9%).
